title: Basalt Watchtower
description: Adds a Villager Watchtower that spawns in Nether Basalt biomes.
body:
This mod adds a Basalt Watchtower that can only be found in Basalt biomes of the Nether.

![Overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9d6be373fc7fc72d482ec182382e854d27a4f50f.jpeg)

Inside, you'll discover Villager workers of all professions and some Nether themed loot.

![Inside](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/69826c7ab20822f1a5e25eb6dab2bbefea3dd270.jpeg)

The structure has multiple layers with decorations, loot, and Villagers, as well as some secrets.

Feel free to put it in your modpack!
